seo_content:
Earn2Trade: US Futures Prop Firm Since 2016

Earn2Trade is a futures prop trading firm based in the United States, established in January 2016. With nearly a decade of operation, Earn2Trade is one of the most veteran futures prop firms in the market. The firm offers two evaluation programs: The Gauntlet Mini (performance-based) and the Trader Career Path (TCP), both under a 1-step structure with a range of account sizes from $25,000 to $200,000.

Account sizes span $25,000 to $200,000. With the 60% discount code match60, Gauntlet Mini pricing is: 200K at $220 (standard $550), 150K at $150 (standard $375), 100K at $126 (standard $315), 50K at $68 (standard $170), and 25K TCP at $60 (standard $150). The TCP program is priced slightly higher: TCP 100K at $140 and TCP 50K at $76. Upon passing, traders advance to a LiveSim account, and then to a live brokerage funded account under the Trader Career Path.

The platform ecosystem is one of the most comprehensive in the futures prop space, supporting over 20 platforms via the Rithmic infrastructure: NinjaTrader, Quantower, Sierra Chart, ATAS Orderflow Trading, Bookmap, Finamark, Inside Edge Trader, Investor/RT, Jigsaw Daytradr, MotiveWave, MultiCharts, OverCharts, Photon, QScalp, QSI-Quick Screen Trading, R Trader, R Trader Pro, Scalp Tool, Trade Navigator, and VolFix. Trading is limited to Futures instruments only. News trading is allowed without restrictions.

The payout structure provides an 80% profit split with payouts processed weekly on Tuesdays (withdrawal email required by Friday 2 PM). The minimum payout is $100. A one-time activation fee of $139 applies for LiveSim non-professional status. The maximum withdrawal from a LiveSim account is $4,000. Copy trading is not allowed; EAs are permitted. Accounts inactive for more than 5 consecutive trading days are affected. All positions must be closed between 3:50 PM and 5:00 PM CT daily.

Earn2Trade is favored by serious futures traders who value a veteran firm with extensive platform support and a clear path to a live brokerage account via the TCP program. Payment methods include Credit/Debit Card, Crypto, and PayPal. The large discount available via coupon code makes Earn2Trade one of the most cost-effective ways to access professional futures evaluation with industry-standard platforms.
